title: Phase B: project doctor iOS layout signals
outOfScope: 特定プロジェクト向け preset

sources.reason: Phase B scope: BUILD signals, *Tests roots, xcodeproj heuristics, tests.
Doctor scanner to extend with read-only iOS layout facts.

problemStatement: Legacy iOS repositories use Podfile, Xcode projects, and FooTests/ layouts that the project doctor does not detect, producing extra blocking unknowns. Phase B adds read-only evidence without auto-approving boundaries or generating xcodebuild commands.

riskAssessment.reason: Shallow root scans must not regress Flutter/SPM detection or slow large monorepos.

executionDecision.reason: Phase B behavior is specified with existing test harness.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm root-only globs avoid deep monorepo walks.
Confirm blocking unknown logic is unchanged when no signals match.
acceptance: BUILD signals include Podfile, *.xcodeproj, and *.xcworkspace with evidence when present at repository root.
Test root candidates include immediate child directories whose names end with Tests.
Production root candidates include conservative sibling directories for *.xcodeproj at repository root when matched.
Doctor still emits blocking unknowns when boundaries cannot be determined; suggestions are not approvals.
Flutter and SPM scan_project regression tests pass.
guidelines: Doctor reports facts only; do not auto-write Guard YAML or Makefile.ai.stack.
Use repository-root shallow scans with depth limits; avoid unbounded recursive glob.
Do not add project-specific presets or customer identifiers.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: No restricted governance path edits in Phase B.
